ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workclass of the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the individual */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (Male/Female) */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours the individual works per week */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income level of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the individual works */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the individual */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area (e.g., city, state) of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the individual */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual */,
  "immigration_status" TEXT /* Immigration status of the individual */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the individual */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Health insurance status of the individual */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, census, administrative record) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workclass */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the workclass (e.g., public, private, non-profit) */,
  "average_wage" TEXT /* Average wage for the workclass */,
  "employment_rate" TEXT /* Employment rate for the workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the education level */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  "tax_bracket" TEXT /* Tax bracket for the income level */,
  "average_expenses" TEXT /* Average expenses for the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the individual */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the individual was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user when accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used by the user when accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
